Linking signal chain...
Signal
Browser alpha
Press ? anytime for controls

Signal Browser Alpha

You are running the belt.

Break asteroids, dock at stations, sell ore, and build relay outposts that keep the network alive at the edge of coverage.

Move WASD or arrows to fly. Mouse aims your ship.
Primary Loop Mine ore, dock, trade up, then build farther into the belt.
Useful Keys E interact or launch. Tab switches station tabs. Esc backs out.
Session Advice Best on desktop with keyboard and mouse. Tab reaches page controls without trapping you in the game.

The alpha is already persistent. Your stations, outposts, and supply plans carry forward between sessions.
